channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — March 25, 2026
item.description: The United States proposes a peace plan to Iran amidst escalating Middle East tensions and global economic fallout. Russia launches its largest drone attack on Ukraine, causing widespread power outages in Moldova. And NASA shifts its lunar strategy, ...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 24, 2026
item.description: From escalating tensions in the Middle East, including a conditional delay on attacks against Iranian power plants, to a stark warning from the World Meteorological Organization on our planet's climate, today's news covers critical developments acros...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 23, 2026
item.description: Welcome to The VENCAst. I am your friendly neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, shifting now into my role as your impartial news anchor. It is Monday, March 23, 2026. Today, we cover escalating tensions in the Middle East, significant election results across...
